name: Iso11783OPChangePolygonScale
title: Iso11783OPChangePolygonScale
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangePolygonScale( dword ecuHandle, dword polygonID, dword width, dword height );
description: The function changes the size of a polygon object. A Change Polygon Scale command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)

parameters.name: polygonID
parameters.description: Object ID of a polygon object

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Width of the bounding rectangle in pixel

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Height of the bounding rectangle in pixel

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
